name: meeting_streak_dampener_v1
description: When the first two races at a meeting are both won by the pre-off favourite, dampen stake on every remaining race at that meeting by 0.75x. Runs last as a sizing modifier so it composes cleanly on top of any rule plugin and any control / guardrail plugin already active.
author: Mark Insley

modifier_logic._run_position_note: Sizing modifiers run AFTER all rule plugins have produced bets and AFTER all control/guardrail plugins have gated them. This plugin multiplies the surviving stake — it never adds, removes, or re-enables a bet.

meeting_session._definition: A meeting is all WIN markets sharing the same Betfair market_definition.venue, on the same race date (UK local), ordered by market_time ascending.

trigger_condition._description: Fires once the first two consecutive races at this meeting have both settled with the pre-off favourite as the winning runner. Once armed, applies to every remaining race at this meeting until the meeting ends.
trigger_condition._favourite_definition: The runner with the lowest exchange best_back price at evaluation time (time_before_off_seconds before that race's off).

effects._stake_multiplier_acceptable_range_note: Mark approved any value in [0.70, 0.75]. 0.75 is the default; the acceptable range is preserved so a future calibration sweep can sweep within it.

reset._rearm_note: Each fresh meeting starts disarmed. A meeting that runs past midnight is rare for UK racing but if it happens the dampener re-arms at 00:00.
